scenarios.title: Temple of Terror
scenarios.tagline: A 1970s pulp expedition into a trap-laden tomb.
scenarios.shortDescription: Race deeper into a cursed archaeological site full of traps, relics, dead ends, and bad decisions.

scenarios.title: Shadow of a Doubt
scenarios.tagline: A haunted house where consciousness itself is under attack.
scenarios.shortDescription: Unravel a cult's doctrine of annihilating consciousness while surviving ghosts, rituals, and a house that wants you hollowed out.

scenarios.title: Charon's Bargain
scenarios.tagline: A compromised freighter, a secret lab, and a grotesque bargain against death.
scenarios.shortDescription: Respond to a medical distress signal aboard a drifting freighter and confront the monstrous cost of refusing to let the dead go.
